security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.
An attacker can craft a vote message that is accepted by the contract without proper validation

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote message may be altered without integrity checks.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not validate message integrity before processing votes.

assumptions: The governance contract does not implement message integrity checks.
The actor can intercept and modify the vote message before it reaches the contract.
The contract does not detect altered messages

mitigation.strategy: Implement message integrity checks (e.g., digital signatures or hashes) and validation.

description: An attacker could modify a valid vote message to change the voting outcome.

security_gap.gap_description: Votes are not properly logged and attributed to users.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Lack of proper logging makes it difficult to track and verify votes.

assumptions: The system does not provide auditable logs of votes cast.
The lack of logging makes it difficult to definitively prove who cast a specific vote.
An attacker can cast votes anonymously

mitigation.strategy: Implement comprehensive logging and auditing of all votes cast, including timestamps, user IDs, and vote details.

description: An attacker could cast votes and deny their participation.

security_gap.gap_description: Votes may be revealed to unauthorized parties.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Votes might be stored insecurely or exposed to unauthorized access.

assumptions: The system does not properly protect vote confidentiality.
Vote data might be stored in an insecure database.
The contract exposes vote data via insecure APIs or interfaces

mitigation.strategy: Encrypt vote data at rest and in transit, and control access to the voting data via authorization mechanisms.

description: An attacker could gain access to votes and learn the voting patterns of participants.
